test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequence::test_create_vehicle_sequence_empty
test-case.label: Test creating an empty VehicleSequence.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequence::test_create_vehicle_sequence_with_train
test-case.label: Test creating a VehicleSequence with a complete train.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequence::test_vehicle_sequence_indexing
test-case.label: Test that vehicles maintain proper indexing.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyStopInfo::test_create_stop_info
test-case.label: Test creating a JourneyStopInfo instance.

test-case.name: tests/test_transport.py::TestJourneyTransport::test_create_transport_minimal
test-case.label: Test creating JourneyTransport with minimal fields.

test-case.name: tests/test_transport.py::TestJourneyTransport::test_create_transport_with_all_fields
test-case.label: Test creating JourneyTransport with all optional fields.

test-case.name: tests/test_transport.py::TestJourneyTransport::test_transport_types
test-case.label: Test all valid transport types.

test-case.name: tests/test_transport.py::TestJourneyTransport::test_express_train
test-case.label: Test creating an express train transport.

test-case.name: tests/test_transport.py::TestJourneyTransport::test_cargo_train
test-case.label: Test creating a cargo train transport.

test-case.name: tests/test_transport.py::TestJourneyTransport::test_maintenance_train
test-case.label: Test creating a maintenance train transport.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestGeoPosition::test_create_geo_position
test-case.label: Test creating a GeoPosition instance.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestGeoPosition::test_geo_position_accepts_floats
test-case.label: Test that GeoPosition accepts float values.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyExtended::test_journey_with_live_data
test-case.label: Test Journey with live data included.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyExtended::test_journey_without_live_data
test-case.label: Test Journey without live data (inactive journey).

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicle::test_create_vehicle_without_load
test-case.label: Test creating a Vehicle without load (locomotive).

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicle::test_create_vehicle_with_load
test-case.label: Test creating a Vehicle with cargo load.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicle::test_vehicle_load_types
test-case.label: Test various vehicle load types.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourneyEvent::test_parse_iso_datetime_with_milliseconds_and_z
test-case.label: Test parsing ISO-8601 datetime with milliseconds and Z timezone.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourneyEvent::test_datetime_is_timezone_aware
test-case.label: Test that parsed datetimes with Z are timezone-aware (UTC).

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourneyEvent::test_datetime_without_timezone
test-case.label: Test that parsed datetimes without timezone info work (timezone-naive).

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourneyEvent::test_stop_types
test-case.label: Test all three stop types: NONE, TECHNICAL, PASSENGER.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourneyEvent::test_event_types
test-case.label: Test both event types: ARRIVAL and DEPARTURE.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourneyEvent::test_realtime_time_types
test-case.label: Test all three realtime time types: SCHEDULE, PREDICTION, REAL.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestJourney::test_create_journey
test-case.label: Test creating a Journey with events.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleLoadEnum::test_all_load_types_valid
test-case.label: Test that all defined load types can be used.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestRailcar::test_create_railcar_minimal
test-case.label: Test creating a Railcar with minimal required fields.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestRailcar::test_create_railcar_with_name_and_dlc
test-case.label: Test creating a Railcar with baptismal name and DLC requirement.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestRailcar::test_railcar_physical_properties
test-case.label: Test railcar physical properties are floats.

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_on_time_arrival
test-case.label: Test delay calculation for on-time arrival.

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_delayed_arrival
test-case.label: Test delay calculation for delayed arrival (>1 minute late).

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_early_arrival
test-case.label: Test delay calculation for early arrival (>1 minute early).

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_small_delay_counts_as_on_time
test-case.label: Test that delays <1 minute are considered on_time.

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_pass_through_station
test-case.label: Test delay calculation for pass-through station (stopType=NONE).

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_technical_stop
test-case.label: Test delay calculation for technical stop.

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_delay_preserves_all_fields
test-case.label: Test that calculate_delay preserves all event fields.

test-case.name: tests/test_delay_calculation.py::TestDelayCalculation::test_large_delay
test-case.label: Test delay calculation for very large delay (>1 hour).

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyLiveData::test_create_live_data_minimal
test-case.label: Test creating JourneyLiveData with minimal required fields.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyLiveData::test_create_live_data_with_optional_fields
test-case.label: Test creating JourneyLiveData with optional fields.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestDelayInfo::test_create_delay_info
test-case.label: Test creating a DelayInfo instance.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestDelayInfo::test_delay_status_types
test-case.label: Test all delay status types: on_time, delayed, early.

test-case.name: tests/test_types.py::TestDelayInfo::test_datetime_formatting
test-case.label: Test that datetime fields can be formatted with strftime.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequencePrintable::test_str_representation_with_locomotive
test-case.label: Test string representation with a locomotive and wagons.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequencePrintable::test_str_representation_without_locomotive
test-case.label: Test string representation without a locomotive.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequencePrintable::test_str_representation_empty_sequence
test-case.label: Test string representation of empty sequence.

test-case.name: tests/test_vehicles.py::TestVehicleSequencePrintable::test_str_representation_no_load
test-case.label: Test string representation with vehicles but no cargo load.

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyEventExtended::test_event_without_passenger_stops
test-case.label: Test event for pass-through station (no passenger stops).

test-case.name: tests/test_extended_types.py::TestJourneyEventExtended::test_event_with_passenger_stops
test-case.label: Test event with scheduled and realtime passenger stop info.
